title: Fonts and Typography of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Fonts and Typography of Evangelion             Quote Post by Otaprince » Mon Oct 25, 2004 11:02 am two questions: 1) what Japanese font is used by Gainax in Evangelion posters and such? (example here: http://purlace.net/eva/card/bcmw1-sp2.jpg ) 2) Evangelion came to have a unique typgraphical style, with tons of Japanese characters crammed into a space. I remember reading _somewhere_ about the designer who came up with this-- who was he, and where might i have read about him?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 29, 2004 1:08 am I remember reading this somewhere, as well... Did you try the theatrical program translations at www.evaotaku.com?

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sun Dec 19, 2004 8:04 pm not sure if anyone cares, but i did some digging and found out both the designer, Norihiko Nezu, and what fonts he used. new Gainax Pages feature on the Typography of Evangelion: http://www.gainaxpages.com/features/typography.html

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Tue Oct 28, 2008 1:07 pm After 4 years, seems the links above no longer lead anywhere... Do we know what font is used for "Evangelion" here?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Oct 28, 2008 1:25 pm Gainax Pages got reorganized a bit: http://www.gainaxpages.com/features/typography.php Unfortunately there's no answer there to your specific question.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 28, 2008 1:39 pm Personally I've been wondering what font was used for the Tel-op as well as the posters and all that so this topic is helpful in that sense.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Oct 29, 2008 7:44 am Don't know about the romaji, but the Japanese seems to be MS Mincho

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Oct 29, 2008 8:32 am It's very similar to Times New Roman I think.... except it doesnt have the bar on the A

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Oct 31, 2008 12:43 am AchtungAffen wrote: Don't know about the romaji, but the Japanese seems to be MS Mincho

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Fri Oct 31, 2008 2:32 pm Well, until we suss out the font, here's my interpretation of the alphabet:

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Dec 16, 2009 8:29 am I'm sorry to bump but a new tread led to this tread. To chazthesilencer, is that a downloadable font?

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Wed Dec 16, 2009 2:31 pm ^Fraid not. Just a shoop. Feel free to use it if you're desperate. ^^Jesus Christ, you really would think I was typing a poem, the way I used to post. Fortunately, people change; or in my case- improve :]

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Dec 16, 2009 2:35 pm the only font I know of is the one used in the english artwork however, that alone was a real bitch & a chore to obtain

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Dec 16, 2009 2:38 pm If someone really wanted to they could take the time to take that and turn it into a working font. I'll look into it.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Dec 16, 2009 2:56 pm I'd suggest tightening up the W and M a bit, specifically by moving the two V sections closer together until the thinner overlapping stroke meets the thicker one at about the midpoint, then trim the rest of the thin one off. I'd probably use thinner strokes for the legs on the K and R as well... they look overall really heavy at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Dec 16, 2009 3:33 pm I know I'm going to come off as incredibly stupid but wouldn't finding Micho Bold be, you know, easy?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Dec 16, 2009 4:04 pm That's the Japanese font, not the English one that people are looking for.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Dec 16, 2009 4:06 pm NemZ wrote: That's the Japanese font, not the English one that people are looking for.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Dec 16, 2009 4:27 pm Xard wrote: I know I'm going to come off as incredibly stupid but wouldn't finding Micho Bold be, you know, easy?

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sun Jun 19, 2011 4:12 am What is the font used for Kanji and kana?
